content:
[6] CONTEXT, CONSTRAINTS, AND DEPENDENCIES
Do not write executable code; focus on detailed, implementation-ready specifications and prompt templates. Keep everything cross-platform and vendor-neutral. Assume prior materials exist in $ARCHIVE_ROOT but may be fragmented; your design should be self-contained enough that a future AI could implement the engine with only this spec, the master OS spec, and the directory roots.

[7] FINAL REQUEST
Produce a detailed, sectioned specification for the Procedural Generation for Evolving Worlds engine that:
(1) defines its conceptual model under the four lenses (Metaformeme, Myth Fusion, Wave Theory, Recursive Storytelling);
(2) describes the full stage structure, with inputs, outputs, and archival side-effects for each stage;
(3) specifies required prompts in $PROMPT_ROOT and spec files in $OS_ROOT/specs and $REPO_ROOT/$ORG_ID/os-foundation, including example names using LAYER-DOMAIN-TYPE-ID-VERSION;
(4) ends with a concise list of “first implementation moves” that an AI-assisted developer could take to turn this engine spec into real scripts and templates.
